'''Okko''', stylized as the '''Great Okko''', was the chief of a tribe of [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and was regarded as the mightiest [[Force-sensitive/Legends|force user]] in his people's history. He participated in the [[Skirmish on Ossus|Battle of Ossus]]. He was the [[Parent/Legends|father]] of [[Jem Ysanna|Jem]] and [[Rayf Ysanna]]. Okko's grandfather rediscovered the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] of Ossus, but kept it a family secret out of fear of looters.

After the battle, Okko and two other Ysanna [[Shaman/Legends|shamans]] were trapped in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] by the forces of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who was seeking to use the tribe as a means to halt the genetic decay of his last [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] soon discovered he was taken to [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] to the clone laboratory at [[Bast Castle]], but unfortunately, the carbon slabs did not have the controls so he hoped to confront the Emperor and free him. But luck was not with Okko as Palpatine was killed before he could tell the secret to opening the slabs.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|audio drama]] [[Star Wars: Empire's End|adaptations]] of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' and [[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'']], Okko was voiced by [[John Cygan]].
